betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Nuclear Age§f

§aThe biggest part of the progression and overall the hardest — welcome to the Nuclear Age!§f

You've mastered advanced materials, factory automation, isotope separation, and pre-nuclear fuel preparation. Now it's time to build actual nuclear reactors, harness fission for massive power generation, and work your way toward the most exotic end-game materials this mod has to offer.

§6What's Ahead§f:
§b• Uranium Enrichment§f — Turn yellowcake into enriched UF6 for reactor fuel
§b• Fission Reactors§f — ZIRNOX, PWR, RBMK, and Watz power plants
§b• Fuel Recycling§f — PUREX processing, fission products, spent fuel management
§b• Advanced Alloys§f — Technetium Steel, Cadmium Steel, Saturnite, CMB Steel
§b• Fusion Power§f — Harness the stars with the Fusion Reactor
§b• Particle Accelerators§f — Create antimatter, schrabidium, and dineutronium

§6Key Concepts§f:
§b• Radiation Safety§f — Use radiation-resistant armor and the Tungsten Reacher
§b• Heat Management§f — All reactors need cooling; steam is power
§b• Neutron Flux§f — Breeding, transmutation, and irradiation all depend on flux
§b• Waste Handling§f — Spent fuel pools, nuclear waste disposal, PUREX reprocessing

§c⚠ Warning§f: This is the most dangerous and complex stage of the mod. Reactors can melt down violently. Radioactive materials require careful handling. Always read the main pages before operating a new reactor type!
